_comment: Hand-reviewed ground truth. Generated by running the engine against fixtures/{tutors,needs}.json with DEFAULT_WEIGHTS, then verifying each ranking makes domain sense before committing it here — see docs/edumatch-benchmark.md#match-relevance.

N-01.note: T-12 (Physics+Math, both online+in-person, 4.85★/50) edges out the T-01/T-04 twins (Math+Physics online+in-person, 4.8★/40) on the rating factor alone; T-01 and T-04 are constraint-identical twins and must tie exactly.

N-02.note: T-06 is the only tutor teaching Spanish at primary level who is online-capable and available Tuesday morning.

N-03.note: T-07 is the only Computer Science tutor at undergrad level, available Thursday morning, online.

N-04.note: Tight-availability edge case: only T-11 teaches Math at grad level AND is free Sunday evening online. Every other Math tutor is excluded on level or availability.

N-05.note: No-qualified-tutor edge case: no fixture tutor teaches Latin. All 12 tutors are excluded on the subject constraint.

N-06.note: Spanish-speaking requirement is the deciding constraint: T-12 is the only in-person-capable Physics/undergrad tutor who also speaks Spanish. The T-01/T-04 twins are excluded here on language alone.
